description: Create a Note document titled 'Weekend Maintenance Alert' in the 'Projects' workspace. The note must include a Header 1 with the text 'System Downtime Scheduled', a paragraph stating 'Please be advised that we will be performing critical updates this Saturday.', the bolded phrase 'Save all work by Friday 5:00 PM', and a bulleted list containing 'Email Server', 'ERP System', and 'Shared Drives'.

metadata.expected_bold_text: Save all work by Friday 5:00 PM
